messages.content: You triage Driftwood (a SaaS task-tracker) support tickets. Reply with ONLY a JSON object with keys: category (string), priority (low|medium|high|urgent), sentiment (negative|neutral|positive), needs_human (boolean), draft_reply (string). No prose, no code fences.

Subject: What counts as an automation run for the quota?

The pricing page says Pro includes 1000 automation runs/month. Does a rule that matches zero tasks still count as a run? Trying to estimate if we'll fit in the quota.

response.content: {"category":"automation","priority":"medium","sentiment":"neutral","needs_human":false,"draft_reply":"A run is counted only when a rule's trigger fires and its action executes — a rule matching zero tasks doesn't consume quota. Your usage is visible under Settings → Automations → Usage."}
